description: Risk taxonomy for cryptocurrency, DeFi, and blockchain agent operations

wallet_read.description: Read-only wallet balance and address lookups. Lowest risk.

token_transfer.description: ERC-20 or native token transfers. High irreversibility risk.

eth_send.description: Native ETH transfers. Extremely irreversible — no refund path.

smart_contract_deploy.description: Smart contract deployment. Permanent on-chain code execution.

smart_contract_call.description: Arbitrary smart contract function calls. Scope depends on contract.

defi_swap.description: DEX swaps. Slippage and MEV risks.

defi_liquidity.description: DeFi liquidity provision or withdrawal. Impermanent loss risk.

defi_borrow.description: DeFi borrowing or flash loans. Protocol risk + liquidation risk.

private_key_ops.description: Any operation involving private keys or seed phrases. Maximum risk.

bridge_transfer.description: Cross-chain bridge transfers. Irreversible and bridge exploit risk.

wallet_create.description: Wallet creation. Lower risk but needs audit trail.

gas_management.description: Gas parameter configuration. Can cause stuck or expensive transactions.

exchange_withdrawal.description: Withdrawing funds from a centralised exchange. Irreversible.

staking.description: Staking or unstaking. Lockup periods vary from days to weeks.

approval.description: ERC-20 approval grants. Unlimited approvals are a major attack vector.
